name: meetinglistener-desktop
description: Briefly desktop app (Electron shell around the web dashboard)

scripts.build:renderer: npm --prefix ../frontend install && npm --prefix ../frontend run build && node scripts/copy-renderer.mjs
scripts.start: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron .
scripts.smoke: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && SMOKE_TEST=1 electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && electron-builder

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Briefly records meeting audio so it can transcribe and summarize your meetings.
